title: Friends Stands in Solidarity with Ramon Nasir at Mother’s Burial - FinancialEDGE
description: Demonstration of solidarity and support for Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations, United Bank for Africa Plc (UBA) at his mother's burial ceremony in Ado-Odo, Ogun State. Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, and Omede Odekina, Media Relations Executive, Marketing & Corporate Communication, UBA Plc, were among those who paid their respects
html:
Demonstration of solidarity and support for Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations, United Bank for Africa Plc (UBA) at his mother’s burial ceremony in Ado-Odo, Ogun State.

Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, and Omede Odekina, Media Relations Executive, Marketing & Corporate Communication, UBA Plc, were among those who paid their respects to the late matriarch.

The ceremony was an opportunity for the UBA team to come together and show their support for Ramon Nasir. The presence of his colleagues was a testament to the strong bond and camaraderie within the UBA family.
